title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: AWS Developers argues that coding alone no longer differentiates junior cloud engineers, as AI agents can generate infrastructure code. Instead, juniors should master fundamentals like security, reliability, cost, and performance while using AI to accelerate delivery and critical thinking about architecture decisions.
